extraction.one_line_summary: POGACAR attacked with 1.5km remaining on Los Machucos' concrete slab rampas (20%+ grades), dropped everyone except ROGLIC, gaining 27 seconds on VALVERDE/QUINTANA and 1:01 on LOPEZ.
tactical_patterns: Astana's late pace-making inside 20km gutted breakaway advantage from 8min to under 4min, opening stage for GC attacks.
Quintana's early attack on Los Machucos (before concrete slabs) failed tactically, leaving him isolated when Slovenians countered harder uphill.
Pogacar/Roglic delayed acceleration until 1.5km, when concrete slabs hit, exploiting Lopez/Quintana's inability to respond on maximal gradients.

rider_signals.POGACAR Tadej: positive: Showed superior explosive power on 20%+ concrete slabs compared to all GC rivals except Roglic, winning sprint finish.
rider_signals.LOPEZ Miguel Angel: negative: Lost 1:01 on final 3km rampa inhumana, worst performance of all GC contenders, showing weakness on extreme gradients.
rider_signals.QUINTANA Nairo: negative: Premature attack before steepest section backfired, finished 27 seconds down after being caught and unable to follow Slovenian counter.
rider_signals.ROGLIC Primoz: positive: Only rider matching Pogacar's acceleration at 1.5km on concrete slabs, maintaining GC control despite conceding stage.
rider_signals.HIGUITA Sergio: neutral: Led breakaway chase group on Los Machucos but absorbed by GC group, moved up 10min deficit without stage win.
rider_signals.LATOUR Pierre: negative: Caught with 1.5km remaining despite solo effort, demonstrating breakaway riders cannot sustain power on 20%+ ramps against fresh GC attacks.
